_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead integrated design team to achieve a finished product.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.560), LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.3/10 (raw 0.226). Shared vocabulary: [lead]. DCWF-only terms [achieve, design, finished, integrated, product, team] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.872, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.3%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Lead integrated design team to achieve a finished product." and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 > STS 0.226 (gap +0.368). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [lead] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Shared tokens: [lead]. DCWF-only: [achieve, design, finished, integrated, product, team]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication].
